summary: Completed testing of WaveWatch universal playlists, grade hierarchy, playlist sorting, and UI improvements. Found critical navigation issue with LiveWatch still present.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Requires content_id and content_type parameters (expected behavior)

design_issues.issue: Still contains 'LiveWatch' link - should be completely removed

passed_tests: Backend: Universal playlists accept all content types (movie, tv, actor, episode, music, game, ebook, software, tv_channel, radio)
Backend: Playlist item removal works with string IDs
Backend: Grade hierarchy - admin/uploader users get is_vip=true and is_vip_plus=true
Backend: Enhanced playlists endpoint supports sort_by parameter (recent, likes, size)
Backend: Movies endpoint includes include_adult parameter
Backend: Ratings counts endpoint returns proper data
Backend: Watch Party endpoints completely removed (return 404)
Frontend: Playlist + button appears on movie hover
Frontend: Playlist popup shows when clicking + button (portal to body)
Frontend: Playlist popup displays playlist names with item counts
Frontend: Discover playlists page has sort options (Recentes, Plus aimees, Plus grandes)
Frontend: Subscription page VIP/VIP+ buttons show 'Bientot disponible'
Frontend: Movies page loads and displays movie cards properly
Frontend: Navigation does NOT contain 'Soiree Cine'
Integration: Admin login and authentication working
Integration: TMDB endpoints working with filters
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Remove 'LiveWatch' from Navigation Medias dropdown - it should not appear in the navigation menu. All other features are working correctly.

success_percentage.backend: 98% (56/57 tests passed - only minor ratings endpoint parameter requirement)
success_percentage.frontend: 90% (most features working but LiveWatch still in navigation)
success_percentage.integration: 95% (playlist popup, sorting, grade hierarchy all working correctly)
